glosses.ja: 承認する; 許可する

sentences.target: Die Chefin muss den Urlaub genehmigen.

translations.de: Die Chefin muss den Urlaub genehmigen.
translations.en: The boss has to approve the vacation.
translations.es: La jefa tiene que aprobar las vacaciones.
translations.fr: La cheffe doit valider les congés.
translations.it: La responsabile deve approvare le ferie.
translations.pt: A chefe precisa aprovar as férias.
translations.ar: يجب على المديرة أن توافق على الإجازة.
translations.nl: De manager moet de vakantie goedkeuren.
translations.hu: A főnöknőnek jóvá kell hagynia a szabadságot.
translations.hi: बॉस को छुट्टी मंजूर करनी है.
translations.el: Η προϊστάμενη πρέπει να εγκρίνει την άδεια.
translations.ja: 上司が休暇を承認しなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; marks the subject noun phrase.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject/agent of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; present, 3rd person singular; expresses necessity and selects the infinitive 'genehmigen'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner for the direct object.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object (thing being approved).
Lexical verb; infinitive; main predicate selected by the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Die Behörde wird den Umbau genehmigen.

translations.de: Die Behörde wird den Umbau genehmigen.
translations.en: The authority will approve the renovation.
translations.pt: A autoridade vai aprovar a reforma.
translations.vi: Cơ quan sẽ phê duyệt việc cải tạo.
translations.nl: De gemeente zal de verbouwing goedkeuren.
translations.el: Η υπηρεσία θα εγκρίνει την ανακαίνιση.
translations.ja: 当局は改修を承認する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Auxiliary; present, 3rd person singular; forms a future periphrasis with the infinitive 'genehmigen'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner for the direct object.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object (thing to be approved).
Lexical verb; infinitive; main predicate complemented by 'wird' (future).

sentences.target: Ich will mir heute ein Eis genehmigen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl miːɐ̯ ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n aɪ̯s ɡəˈneːmɪɡn̩/

translations.de: Ich will mir heute ein Eis genehmigen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl miːɐ̯ ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n aɪ̯s ɡəˈneːmɪɡn̩/
translations.en: I want to treat myself to an ice cream today.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je veux m'offrir une glace.
translations.ko: 오늘은 아이스크림 하나 사 먹고 싶다.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我想犒劳自己，吃个冰淇淋。
translations.yue: 今日我想獎勵自己食支雪糕。
translations.pt: Hoje quero me dar um sorvete.
translations.he: היום אני רוצה לפנק את עצמי בגלידה.
translations.tr: Bugün kendimi bir dondurmayla şımartmak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi muốn tự thưởng cho mình một cây kem.
translations.ar: اليوم أريد أن أدلّل نفسي بآيس كريم.
translations.nl: Vandaag wil ik mezelf trakteren op een ijsje.
translations.hu: Ma szeretném megjutalmazni magam egy fagyival.
translations.hi: आज मैं खुद को आइसक्रीम खिलाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα θέλω να κεράσω τον εαυτό μου ένα παγωτό.
translations.nb: I dag vil jeg unne meg en is.
translations.id: Hari ini aku mau traktir diri sendiri es krim.
translations.sv: I dag vill jag unna mig en glass.
translations.ro: Astăzi vreau să mă răsfăț cu o înghețată.
translations.da: I dag vil jeg forkæle mig selv med en is.
translations.ja: 今日はアイスを食べて自分にご褒美をあげたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; present, 1st person singular; expresses desire and selects the infinitive 'genehmigen'.
Personal pronoun; dative, 1st person singular; indirect object/benefactive; reflexive use in the idiom 'sich etwas genehmigen'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause, indicating time.
Indefinite article; accusative neuter singular; determiner for the direct object.
Common noun; neuter; accusative singular; direct object (what is being treated to).
Lexical verb; infinitive; complements the modal 'will'; reflexive/benefactive use with dative 'mir'.

sentences.target: Sie lassen den Vertrag endlich genehmigen.

translations.de: Sie lassen den Vertrag endlich genehmigen.
translations.en: They are finally getting the contract approved.
translations.es: Por fin consiguen que aprueben el contrato.
translations.fr: Ils font enfin approuver le contrat.
translations.it: Finalmente riescono a far approvare il contratto.
translations.ko: 그들은 드디어 계약 승인을 받아내고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们终于让合同获批了。
translations.pt: Eles estão finalmente conseguindo a aprovação do contrato.
translations.he: הם סוף סוף משיגים אישור לחוזה.
translations.vi: Cuối cùng họ cũng xin được phê duyệt hợp đồng.
translations.ar: هم أخيرًا يحصلون على الموافقة على العقد.
translations.nl: Ze krijgen het contract eindelijk goedgekeurd.
translations.hi: वे आखिरकार अनुबंध की मंजूरी दिलवा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Επιτέλους καταφέρνουν να εγκριθεί το συμβόλαιο.
translations.id: Mereka akhirnya berhasil mengurus persetujuan kontrak.
translations.ro: În sfârșit reușesc să obțină aprobarea contractului.
translations.ja: 彼らはついに契約の承認を取りつけた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative; either 3rd person plural 'they' or formal 2nd person 'You'; subject of 'lassen'.
Finite lexical verb; present; causative 'to have something done'; takes infinitival complement 'genehmigen' and an object.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Vertrag'.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; the entity to be approved (object in the embedded clause).
Sentence adverb; modifies the whole event, indicating culmination/long-awaited action.
Lexical verb; infinitive; non-finite complement of the causative 'lassen'; denotes the approving action.
